ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, financial analyst, department manager) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data entry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial data entry */,
  "line_item_code" TEXT /* Line item code for the financial data entry */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department the financial data belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who created the financial data entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the financial data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the financial data entry was last updated */,
  "jun_2004" TEXT /* Value for June 2004 */,
  "mar_2004" TEXT /* Value for March 2004 */,
  "dec_2003" TEXT /* Value for December 2003 */,
  "sep_2003" TEXT /* Value for September 2003 */,
  "jun_2003" TEXT /* Value for June 2003 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_line_item_code FOREIGN KEY ("line_item_code") REFERENCES line_items ("line_item_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "line_items" (
  "line_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each line item */,
  "line_item_code" TEXT /* Line item code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the line item */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department the line item belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_line_items_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "financial_data_id" INTEGER /* Financial data entry the audit trail is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_financial_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("financial_data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commitments" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commitment */,
  "financial_data_id" INTEGER /* Financial data entry the commitment is for */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of commitment (e.g., nonmortgage loan, mortgage loan) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the commitment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the commitment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commitments_financial_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("financial_data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contingencies" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contingency */,
  "financial_data_id" INTEGER /* Financial data entry the contingency is for */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of contingency (e.g., loan, investment) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the contingency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the contingency was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contingencies_financial_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("financial_data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consolidated_commitments" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consolidated commitment */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department the consolidated commitment is for */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of commitment (e.g., nonmortgage loan, mortgage loan) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the consolidated commitment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the consolidated commitment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consolidated_commitments_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)
